results.title: Moratorium for AI Data Centers now in Hochul's hands
results.description: BUFFALO, N.Y. (WIVB) – A proposed AI data center in the Town of Tonawanda remains delayed as developers look for more information on energy availability and infrastructure needs, but opponents of the project are celebrating another development. A bill that would place a temporary moratorium on permits for centers like this has passed the state [...]
